title: salix × compacta
intro: Salix × compacta, also known as the compact willow or dwarf willow, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Salix genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant offers several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Salix × compacta is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves, and can be found in traditional medicine and natural remedy products.
